title: From top-to-toe, we’ve got your glow at SkinPhD
description: BUSINESS NEWS - SkinPhD George is more than...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - SkinPhD George is more than just beauty. People come to us to look their best, yes, but also to feel better, take a break from daily stress, and enjoy professional care in a space that’s just for them.

Located in the vibrant new Outeniqua Lifestyle Centre, SkinPhD George is your destination for expert care, advanced treatments, personalised attention and advice.


> Whether you're looking to treat a specific skin concern, refresh your hairstyle, relax and unwind with a deluxe massage, or enjoy simply enjoy beautifully done nails - our experienced, skilled and passionate team is here to assist.


From first-time visitors to seasoned self-care enthusiasts, SkinPhD George is where transformation happens - confidently, professionally, and with heart.

What sets us apart is that you can experience a range of BEAUTY, NAIL & HAIR services, all in the comfort of a single salon.

Cast your vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

Our salon is a place of community, upliftment, and trust, and these nominations reflect this. Winning this award would be a celebration of our clients as much as our team — and a testament to what happens when purpose meets passion.

Thank you, George, for believing in us!

Proud nominees of 5 Best of George 2025 awards:

- Best Aesthetics/Laser Clinic
- Best Beauty/Health Spa
- Best Hair Salon
- Best Make-up Artist
- Best Salon

www.skinphd.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
